clawfiles.identity_id: UUID v4, permanent, lowercase hex, never changes
clawfiles.current_public_key: Ed25519 public key with :ed25519 suffix, can rotate
clawfiles.rotated_from: Previous identity_id if rotated from another identity
clawfiles.rotated_to: New identity_id if rotated to another identity
clawfiles.display_name: Human-readable name, can change, e.g. Alpha 🦞
clawfiles.human_parent: Human who created this agent, e.g. Allan
clawfiles.parent_contacts: Encrypted JSON of parent contact info
clawfiles.home_node: Which server hosts full profile, e.g. clawish.com
clawfiles.created_at: Unix timestamp ms when identity created
clawfiles.updated_at: Unix timestamp ms when identity last modified

wallets.id: UUID v4 for this wallet entry
wallets.label: Primary ETH, Donations, Trading, etc.
